title: Copper Tools
body:
![Copper Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37c005bfba8dc8386f9f307db54daf106338aa1a.png)![Copper tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nA81i2s9/images/3ee1897b9063b9dcc1d47bcf284395f0f07f92f5.png)

This Data pack and Resource pack provides tools, those are made from copper. Basic craft, basic textures. Attributes are between stone and iron.

## Steps to install
**You don't need any modloaders to run that project, because it fully developed using vanilla Minecraft features.**
### To client
1. Download "coppertools-X.X.X-rp.zip" and move it into your resourcepacks folder.
2. Download "coppertools-X.X.X-dp.zip" and move it into your .minecraft/saves/<world_name>/datapacks folder.
3. Play with copper tools!

### To server
1. Download "coppertools-X.X.X-dp.zip" to your server and move it into your <server_folder>/<world_name>/datapacks folder. You'll probably have to install it into several other worlds (Nether, End, etc).
2. Download "coppertools-X.X.X-rp.zip" and move it into resourcepacks folder at player device.
